description_long: This is a life-sized bust sculpture of a man, mounted on a tall rectangular pedestal. The bust depicts a male figure with short hair and a collared shirt, rendered in a realistic style with detailed facial features. The pedestal is inscribed with text, which appears to commemorate the individual, and is set on a circular stone or cobblestone base. The material of both the bust and pedestal appears to be a dark, weathered stone or bronze, giving the sculpture a somber and dignified appearance. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with the bust seamlessly integrated into the pedestal. The sculpture is likely intended as a public monument or memorial.
description: A realistic bust of a man atop a tall, inscribed pedestal, crafted from dark stone or bronze and set on a circular stone base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed face, upper torso, and the inscribed text on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the unadorned back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile of the bust and the pedestal's side surface.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors, likely in a public urban space or park, as indicated by the stone base and open surroundings.
